description:
Identify all items in the 'General Chemicals' repository with a stock amount strictly less than 10 and tag them as 'Restock Needed'. Create a new task named 'Weekly Requisition' within the 'Lab Administration' project's 'Purchasing' experiment, listing the names of these low-stock chemicals in the task description.
